features.name: coverage option with cpp-to-inputport assignment
features.description: Code should include Verilog code that is driven by C++ code writing to input ports while the coverage option is enabled
features.snippet:
input di;
always @(posedge clk) if (dtb[1] & di) vo0b <= 1'b1;

features.name: intermediate wire used in sequential always block condition
features.description: Code should include a wire that holds a computed expression which is then used in an if condition inside a sequential always block
features.snippet:
wire dt0w = dtb[1] & di;
always @(posedge clk) if (!resetn) vo0wb <= 1'b0; else if (dt0w) vo0wb <= 1'b1;

features.name: equivalent direct expression vs wire expression
features.description: Code should include two equivalent signal paths where one uses a direct expression in the always condition and the other uses an intermediate wire
features.snippet:
// direct: always @(posedge clk) if (dtb[1] & di) vo0b <= 1'b1;
// wire: wire dt0w = dtb[1] & di; always @(posedge clk) if (dt0w) vo0wb <= 1'b1;

features.name: rotating register with bit selection
features.description: Code should include a rotating shift register using bit selection to track state across clock cycles
